chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-461 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 2124/25 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on CMA 2125/25 4.For hearing of main case 10-04-2025 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. **** 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2to4. Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
